name.en-US: ECO-CO2 Elsys LoRaWAN Eco CO₂ Sensor
name.pt-BR: ECO-CO2 Sensor Eco CO₂ LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ECO-CO2 — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors CO₂, temperature and humidity. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ECO-CO2 — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora CO₂, temperatura e umidade. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
